description_long: This stuffed toy is a stylized, blue, anthropomorphic creature with large, rounded black eyes and a wide mouth displaying small, pointed teeth. Its oversized ears are prominent, with pinkish inner ear details, and one ear has a distinctive notch. The body is plump with a lighter blue belly and chest, and the back features darker blue patches in an organic pattern. The arms and legs are short and stubby, ending in clawed hands and feet, and the toy has a small, rounded tail. The overall appearance is soft and plush, with a smooth, matte finish and a friendly, cartoonish demeanor.
description: A blue, plush cartoon creature with large ears, big black eyes, and a light blue belly, featuring a friendly and playful appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large black eyes, wide mouth with visible teeth, oversized ears with pink interiors, and the light blue belly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the protruding snout, and the thickness of the ears and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dark blue patches on the back, the rounded tail, and the back of the ears.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, ear shape, and the curve of the body and limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and slightly mischievous, with wide, open eyes and a mouth showing small, pointed teeth in a friendly manner.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs apart, head facing forward and ears extended outward.
